name: callbell
description: The interface between you and the agent: shared norms, a scaffold for backlog and memory, filing, import, planning, and git.

interface.shortDescription: Shared norms, filing, backlog and memory for any repo
interface.longDescription: The interface between you and the agent: shared norms, a scaffold for backlog and memory, filing, import, planning, and git. /callbell:start is the way in — it checks what a folder is missing and lays it down. What kind of work gets done is decided by the purpose packs you switch on beside it.
defaultPrompt: Set up this project with callbell.
Process what I put in the import zone.
